component.name: Aerion
component.summary: Lightweight open-source email client for Linux
Nenáročný open-source e-mailový klient pro Linux
Client e-mail open-source léger pour Linux
一款现代化，轻量级的开源 Linux 电子邮件客户端应用程序
一款現代化，輕量級的開源 Linux 電子郵件客戶端應用程式
一款現代化，輕量級的開源 Linux 電子郵件客戶端應用程式

description.p: Aerion is a modern, lightweight email client inspired by Geary, focused on resource efficiency and a clean user experience.
Aerion je moderní, nenáročný e-mailový klient inspirovaný aplikací Geary, zaměřený na efektivní využití systémových prostředků a čistý uživatelský zážitek.
Aerion est un client e-mail moderne et léger inspiré par Geary, axé sur l'efficacité des ressources et une expérience utilisateur épurée.
Aerion 是一款以 Geary 为灵感，注重资源效率与简洁使用体验的现代化轻量级电子邮件客户端应用程序。
Aerion 是一款以 Geary 為靈感，注重資源效率與簡潔使用體驗的現代化輕量級電子郵件客戶端應用程式。
Aerion 是一款以 Geary 為靈感，注重資源效率與簡潔使用體驗的現代化輕量級電子郵件客戶端應用程式。

ul.li: Multiple email accounts with unified inbox
Více e-mailových účtů se sjednocenou schránkou
Plusieurs comptes e-mail avec une boîte de réception unifiée
多账号支持与统一收件箱
多帳戶支援與統一收件箱
多帳號支援與統一收件匣
Support for Gmail, Outlook, and generic IMAP/SMTP
Podpora Gmailu, Outlooku a obecného IMAP/SMTP
Prise en charge de Gmail, Outlook et IMAP/SMTP générique
支持 Gmail、Outlook 及通用 IMAP/SMTP
支援 Gmail、Outlook 及通用 IMAP/SMTP
支援 Gmail、Outlook 及通用 IMAP/SMTP
Conversation threading
Zobrazení konverzačních vláken
Affichage des messages par fil de discussion
会话线程视图
對話串檢視
對話串檢視
Rich text WYSIWYG composer with TipTap editor
Vizuální (WYSIWYG) editor formátovaného textu využívající TipTap
Éditeur de message WYSIWYG en texte enrichi avec TipTap
使用 TipTap 编辑器的所见即所得撰写界面
使用 TipTap 編輯器的所見即所得撰寫界面
使用 TipTap 編輯器的所見即所得撰寫介面
Contact sync (CardDAV, Google, Microsoft) for auto-completion
Synchronizace kontaktů (CardDAV, Google, Microsoft) pro automatické doplňování
Synchronisation des contacts (CardDAV, Google, Microsoft) pour l'auto-complétion
联系人同步（CardDAV、Google、Microsoft）与自动补全
聯絡人同步（CardDAV、Google、Microsoft）與自動完成
聯絡人同步（CardDAV、Google、Microsoft）與自動完成
Dark mode and multiple color themes
Tmavý režim a několik barevných motivů
Mode sombre et thèmes de couleurs multiples
深色模式与多种颜色主题
深色模式與多種色彩主題
深色模式與多種色彩主題
Keyboard-friendly navigation with vim-style shortcuts
Ovládání z klávesnice se zkratkami ve stylu Vim
Navigation au clavier avec raccourcis de style Vim
支持 Vim 风格快捷键的键盘导航
支援 Vim 風格快捷鍵的鍵盤導航
支援 Vim 風格快捷鍵的鍵盤導航
Detachable composer window
Oddělitelné okno pro psaní zprávy
Fenêtre de rédaction détachable
可分离的撰写窗口
可分離的撰寫視窗
可分離的撰寫視窗
Basic tracking element removal from emails
Základní odstraňování sledovacích prvků z e-mailů
Suppression basique des éléments de suivi des e-mails
基本的邮件追踪元素移除
基本的郵件追蹤元素移除
基本的郵件追蹤元素移除
PGP and S/MIME support
Podpora PGP a S/MIME
Prise en charge de PGP et S/MIME
PGP 与 S/MIME 支持
PGP 與 S/MIME 支援
PGP 與 S/MIME 支援

screenshot.caption: Aerion main window showing inbox
Hlavní okno aplikace Aerion zobrazující schránku
Fenêtre principale d'Aerion affichant la boîte de réception
Aerion 主窗口显示收件箱
Aerion 主視窗顯示收件箱
Aerion 主視窗顯示收件匣

ul.li: Added Czech translation
Added drag-and-drop to move messages to another folder
Added cross account copy/move mail - #108
Added draggable recipients in composer - #111
Added auto-commit recipient on lost focus - #85
Added composer del/backspace guard to prevent accidental message delete
Fixed detached composer system theme detection - #153
Fixed launch flow - #154
Made contact circles themeable
Added live theme change preview
Added Adwaita themes (Light/Dark)
Added Breeze themes (Light/Dark)
Added Catppuccin themes (Latte/Frappe/Macchiato/Mocha)
Added Dracula theme
Added Github themes (Light/Soft Dark/Dark)
Added Tokyo Night theme
Added Nord themes (Light/Dark)
Added Pop! themes (Light/Dark)
Added VS Code themes (Light/Dark)
Added Yaru themes (Light/Dark)
Added thread and message focus mode - #129
Added contact circle enable/disable
Added French translation
Fixed keyboard expand/collapse of focused messages
Fixed untranslated drop down menu items
Fixed iCloud Empty Trash - #136
Added ESLint for frontend linting

description.p: Note: As of 2026-04-26, Aerion is CASA Tier 2 certified and verified by Google so OAuth2 signin is no longer blocked.

ul.li: Refactored N+1 query on folder switch - #117
Fixed IMAP server side search regression
Fixed settings tab icons - #125
Fixed plain text links - #113

description.p: As of 2026-04-26, Aerion is CASA Tier 2 certified and verified by Google so oAuth2 signin will no longer be blocked.

v0.1.39 is a major milestone that includes some remaining originally planned basic features and a substantial amount of bug fixes/refinements focused on making existing features much more reliable/stable. It will serve as a solid foundation for us to continue the further development of this mail client.

ul.li: Added image block logic to composer to avoid leaks
Added folder subscription for auto sync - #83
Added optional accent bar for unread messages - #92
Added copy text in viewer context menu - #77
Added select all in viewer context menu - #77
Enable native context menu in composer - #77
Added Shared Mailbox support for Microsoft 365 - #93
Improved copy/move to folder selection dialog
Improved invalid encoding handling
Fixed another ghost message issue
Fixed invalid e-mail date hang
Fixed identity switch on replies and forwards
Fixed draft save and send race condition
Added proper smtp connect timeout
Added proper IMAP STARTTLS connect timeout
Fixed inefficient serilization for inline images and attachments
Added inline image and attachment size limit
Fixed inline images on replies and forwards
Fixed reply/forward signature placement
Added AttachConsole to for Windows builds for debug output
Fixed murena.io CardDav - #86
Fixed some HK translation
Fixed non-UTF filename attachment open and download
Fixed save to sent folder behavior - #98
Improve composer formatting
Fixed unchecked rand.Read() in Cryptographic Code
Backfilled missing DB error handling
Added proper panic recovery
Fixed pasted inline image sending
Fixed undo delete regression
Fixed name and subject preview decoding - #104
Fixed provider icons consistency - #102
Added better pgp and s/mime error feedback
Added a wider range of PGP keys and S/MIME certs support - #107
Fixed message list refresh on IDLE sync
Fixed orphaned deleted messages in message list
Increased go test coverage
Bumped to Node 24 (LTS)
Changed copy to and move to folder selection to dialog box instead
Improved moved message handling
Fixed copy and delete logic for Gmail
Fixed threading copies of message across folders together
Fixed post bulk delete focus - #81
Fixed post send conversation refresh
Fixed default from identity for replies
Fixed username auto-fill in add account dialog
Fixed attachment warning logic - #79
Added u-inbox reload guards for better post sync behavior
Fixes for #78 and #76:
-- Added additional display render error detection - #74
-- Eliminated duplicate event emission from IDLE body fetch
-- Eliminated redundant webkit calls
-- Cache image allowlist on frontend
-- Handle messages still downloading better
-- Fixed Timer Leak in scheduleMarkAsRead
-- Increased max concurrent db connections
-- Added stale guards
-- Reload necessary messages only during sync
-- Filter unified inbox reloads to inbox folders only
Fixed spinning wheel of death in Image Tab of Settings - #73
Added Images tab to Settings Dialog to manage Always Load lists
Security - Remove OAuth debug
Security - Fix attachment file perms
Security - Sanitize attachment filename
Security - Validate paths in OpenFile and OpenFolder
Security - Fix IPC socket TOCTOU with umask
Security - Strip CRLF in writeHeader
Cleanup - Removed dead UnblockRemoteImages function
Cleaned up image loading logic
Added CardDAV returning time.RFC1123Z (purelymail) workaround - #71
Added CardDAV returning unquoted Etag (mailbox.org) workaround - #26
Fixed message list checkboxes not responding to shift click - #67
Added dynamic title to detached composer
Fixed frontend warning
Updated npm packages
Improved flags values guarding
Fixed show attachment in folder - #69
Fixed downloading synthetically named attachments
Added proper flatpak attachments opening from toast logic
Improved has_attachment marking
Fix - Use reply-to on replies - #64
Fixed shift + click selection regression - #67
Fixed detached composer title bar - #65
Fixed start hidden busy cursor - #66
Fixed title bar setting regression - #57
Extracted theme logic from App.svelte into a dedicated Svelte store
Added a Dark (Balanced) theme
Added a Light (Balanced) theme
Added tables and HTML mode to signature composer
Added option to use native title bar/decorations - #53
Added display of reply-to, cc, and bcc if not empty - #54
Added always load image setting - #40
Fixed Cosmic Desktop bug - needs testing - #55
Added workaround instructions for GPU driver bugs - #56
Toast message to provide feedback for successful link clicks
Cross accounts from field
Handle external mailto calls
Added composer tab in settings
Allow setting detached composer as default
Choose default or detached composer to handle mailto links
Allow setting plaintext as default
Moved read receipt setting to composer tab
Cross account from field
Fixed drag and drop inline images and attachments - #41
Fixed star buttons and states - #42
Fixed links in threads #48
Fixed attachment logic and extraction for non-text parts - needs a force resync to apply
Fixed orphaned drafts - #47
Fixed flatpak attachment download - #51
Consolidated duplicate code between composer and detached composer
Close conversation viewer if deleted
Don't auto-open next message if in vertical mobile layout - #30
Fixed empty from field - #39
Slight visual adjustments to the message list checkboxes
Always show checkboxes on message list when in vertical mobile layout - #30
Added per folder filters for unread, starred, and attachments - #37
Refactored MessageList.svelte for better maintainability and performance
Resuming Flathub submission

description.p: NOTE: A massive amount of features and fixes were in v0.1.25 - v0.1.27 which were not released in Flathub. Check the Release Page (https://github.com/hkdb/aerion/releases) to see these changes.

ul.li: Made IMAP folders with sub-folders collapsible
Identity aware PGP and S/MIME
Improved guard rails for PGP and S/MIME import, sign, encrypt, and decrypt
Added multi-language support for missing dynamic message translations
Proper flatpak implementation of autostart on login - #33
Fixed nested IMAP folders fetching - #34
Fixed empty or encrypted body preview in message list
Fixed delete silently failing on proton and other generic providers - #31
Added run in background - #15
Added launch hidden - #15
Added launch on startup - #15
Added Wake and net detection for Windows and Mac
Added Clickable notifications for Windows and Mac
Added Empty Trash button for Trash folders - #21
Added multi-language support foundation - #10
Added 中文(香港), 中文(台灣), 中文(中国)
Added IMAP search - #24
Added Responsive layout to handle both tiling and mobile - #8
Fixed sync race condition when moving message during post move sync
Fixed Trash folder detection to include Bin
Cleaned up and reorganized sync engine code to be more maintainable
GMail app password fix - #22
Fixed dialog boxes blurry fonts - #23
Added context menu to folder pane - #21
Close conversation viewer when a message is marked as unread
Added right alt for triggering context menu with keyboard
Fixed race condition on marking message read when notification clicked
Fixed wake from sleep flow - #17
Added proper network state monitoring
Improved wake, scheduled syncs, idle, and status logic with net state
Added proper logic for offline mode
Fixed S/MIME algo - #13
Added PGP support - needs more testing
Added S/MIME support - needs more testing
Fixed composer rapid enter lag issue with 0 margin p instead of br
Added auto refresh of draft folder on discard
Added logic to prevent uneccessary reloads of loaded conversations if there's no change
Fixed draft synced to server indication regression
Fixed inserted images and attachments saved in draft folder
Max window size fix #4
Auto-focus to the To: field on launch of new composer and on forwards
Fixed reliability issues with attach file and insert image
Fixed deletion while syncing
Improved dead connections handling which makes wake from sleep more reliable and should fix #9
Fixed delete mail from trash #9
Added reply, reply-all, and forward of a specific message
Fixed move mail from trash back to inbox
Improved Sent Folder detection (Wrong sent folder mapping will break threading)
Ctrl+A when focused on message list will select all messages #14
Ctrl+A when focused on conversation viewer will select all text of the expanded email in viewport
Added resolution change detection
Added trusted self-signed cert flow and store
Improvied imap login logic
Improved image blocking to include CSS loaded images
Enabled horizontal scrolling in conversation viewer
Fixed terms acceptance visibility
Enhanced system theme detection
Fixed idle.go/server.go
Implemented a workaround for calling dialog through portal
Removed redundant desktop-file-edit commands from Flatpak manifest
Converted to Flathub build from source
Added refresh conversation viewer if new mail arrives in the thread
Added auto scroll to the bottom (newest mail) in conversation viewer on long threads
GA/Flathub submission fix
Removed flatpak perm that's already allowed by default
Fixed hash calculation for Flatpak build and Flathub submission
Refactored Linux notifications to use org.freedesktop.portal.Desktop
Kept DBUS direct notifications if launched with --dbus-notify
Added trigger to refocus to Aerion if notification is clicked
Added install.sh and uninstall.sh to Linux binary release
Distribute binary tarballs with assets instead of just binary for Linux
Fixed flatpak app ID
Flathub submission fixes
New Github Actions worksflow that makes much more sense
Finalized flatpak submission
Fixed links that don't open in browser (ie. Linkedin, etc)
Added show link on hover
Added context menu for links so users can choose to copy the link instead of clicking it directly
Removed AppImage build
Implemented Flatpak build
Fixed detached composer theme
Fixed message focus on refresh
Improved transitions for smoother UX
Added multiple color themes
Added ability to disable window title bar in settings
